name: Euphoros Agrocorp Greentech
role: Lead Brand Strategist, Logo & Identity Designer
desc: A growth-oriented brand architecture and mark for a sustainability-driven agritech company. The identity was designed to flex across packaging and field materials, conveying both natural roots and modern green technology ambitions.
brief: A growth-oriented brand architecture and mark for a sustainability-driven agritech company. The identity was designed to flex across packaging and field materials, conveying both natural roots and modern green technology ambitions.
overview: A growth-oriented brand architecture and mark for a sustainability-driven agritech company. The identity was designed to flex across packaging and field materials, conveying both natural roots and modern green technology ambitions.
focus: Growth, sustainability, flexibility across packaging and environmental contexts.
